activities.title: Gate Compaction By Provider
activities.description: Before a cache-aware / legacy-large-policy compaction runs, route the decision through the per-provider strategy: claude (stateless, large window) declines when there is no real context pressure; codex/general keep behaviour byte-identical (DD-4).

activities.title: Report Compaction Outcome Honestly
activities.description: Push the compaction event under kind 'compaction' and the enrichment lifecycle event under a first-class kind 'enrichment' — never forcing enrichment to wear the compaction label (DD-1).

activities.title: Decide Amnesia Notice
activities.description: Scan the recentEvents ring in reverse for the most recent real client-side compaction and inject the amnesia notice for it; enrichment entries are skipped because they are no longer kind 'compaction' (DD-2).

activities.title: Resume Interrupted Task
activities.description: When the compaction interrupted an unfinished turn, continue the task (replay the unanswered user request post-anchor, or inject a minimal Continue) so the loop does not exit via no_user_after_compaction; a legitimately finished turn stays finished (DD-3).

arrows.label: per-provider compaction policy (claude window headroom; codex/general unchanged)
Q-card tile entries (enrichment NOT shown as compaction)
amnesia decision (inject for the real anchor) + anchor state
amnesia notice fragment (recall affordance) for the real compaction
continuation policy (resume unfinished; never re-fire a finished turn; coexist with unproductive-round breaker)
resumed in-flight task (no manual go-on) | clean exit if finished
